title: Lukasino's Artillery
body:
# What is this mod?
Lukasino's Artillery (LA) adds a large long-range cannon with immersive controls.

Instead of just opening a single GUI or clicking on a block to mark it as a target, this mod uses in-world interactive blocks for aiming, loading, and firing the cannon.

So now you can destroy your friend's base while being thousands of blocks away!

## Usage
There is a detailed in-game guidebook. Please read it first, and then you can ask for additional help on Discord.

## Features
- Modular cannon
- Interactive cannon controls
- In-game guidebook
- Destroying friendships (friends required)

## Coming soon...
- Improved targeting system
- Console upgrades
- Different ammunition types
- Rocket defenses
- And much more!

## Requires Geckolib!

### Reporting bugs
LA is still in an early phase of development. Bugs are to be expected. Please try to determine how to reproduce the issue, and then report it on Discord.

### Thanks to
- Pixabay and its community for providing sound effects used in this mod.
- Bippinbits for developing PVKK. This mod is in no way connected to official Bippinbits developers or to the PVKK game. It is a fan project heavily inspired by PVKK promotional videos.
